title: Platantheroides ligulata
intro: Platantheroides ligulata, also known as the ligule orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to China. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiviral agent, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The bioactive constituents of Platantheroides ligulata include phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote respiratory health and boost the immune system.
